attributes.action: Protect Women and Children by Medically Castrating Paedophiles and Rapists
attributes.additional_details: Crimes against women and children are getting more rampant and we need an effective deterrent. This will also result in fewer NHS referrals for PTSD which will improve operational capacity etc. This was being trialed in 2025 but it doesn't seem to have caught any wind.
attributes.background: Introduce a bill to change sentencing guidelines so that if a person is found guilty of Aggravated Sexual Assault, the punishment is chemical castration.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Chemical castration for all rapists and sexual abuse offenders
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747455
